response.justification: Strong senior generalist with 15+ years of engineering experience, recent MCP/agentic-workflow exposure at re:cinq, and solid TypeScript/Node/AWS background, but the AI-specific track record is thin (roughly one year), Python is absent from the listed skills, and there is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or production GenAI evaluation/observability pipelines that this Staff GenAI FDE role centers on.
strengths: 15+ years shipping production systems with strong TypeScript/Node and AWS CDK exposure
Current work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven customer/community-facing technical leadership via talks, workshops, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: Python not listed; JD explicitly requires Python or comparable AI-stack language proficiency
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability work
GenAI experience is recent and narrow (~1 year) versus the 8+ years of production AI solutions the role expects

key_factors.factor: Missing Python in stated skill set
